entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: दुई layers maintain गर्नुहोस्: selected time र worldview ले bounded in-character voice, र documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, र uncertainty flag गर्ने historian sidecar। historically fitting हुँदा person लाई resist, challenge, evade, back questions ask गर्न, वा false premises reject गर्न दिनुहोस्।

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Understanding सहित Problems Solve गर्न Math Step Coach निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: प्रत्येक step बुझ्दै math solve गर्नुहोस्। तपाईंको coach ले work check गर्छ, slips देखाउँछ, र confidence build गर्छ।

entries.source: Need a first step right now?

Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: generated dialogue लाई authenticated quotation का रूपमा कहिल्यै present नगर्नुहोस्। harmful views sanitize नगर्नुहोस् वा oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, वा violence glorify नगर्नुहोस्। Context ले excuse नगरी clarify गर्नुपर्छ। persona मार्फत medical, legal, financial, वा harmful advice नदिनुहोस्। historical person बाट learning र तिनीहरूलाई endorse गर्ने कुराबीचको फरक preserve गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: future answers कहिल्यै reveal नगर्नुहोस्। topic ले advanced challenge मागेको छैन भने trick questions avoid गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Company ले Terms मा set forth कुनै term वा condition waive गरेको कुरा त्यही term वा condition को further वा continuing waiver, वा कुनै other term वा condition को waiver मानिने छैन, र Company ले Terms अन्तर्गत कुनै right वा provision assert गर्न असफल भएकोले त्यस्तो right वा provision को waiver constitute गर्नेछैन। यदि competent jurisdiction भएको court वा other tribunal ले Terms को कुनै provision invalid, illegal वा unenforceable कुनै कारणले ठहर गर्यो भने, त्यस्तो provision eliminate वा minimum extent सम्म limit गरिनेछ ताकि Terms का remaining provisions full force र effect मा जारी रहून्।

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: होइन। Private saved chats private identifiers प्रयोग गर्छन्, sitemap मा listed छैनन्, र llms.txt, llms-full.txt, वा ai-content-index.json जस्ता AI discovery files मा समावेश छैनन्।

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: होइन। Public pages indexable छन्, तर private saved chats sitemap, llms files, वा AI content index मा समावेश छैनन्।

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: होइन। Public subject pages र guest mode entrypoints indexable छन्, तर private saved chats discovery files बाट excluded छन्।

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: होइन। category structure ले search engines लाई library बुझ्न मद्दत गर्छ, तर प्रत्येक page learner लाई guide choose गर्न, right mode खोल्न, र actively studying जारी राख्न मद्दत गर्न intended छ।

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: होइन। comparison ले public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, र learning paths मा मात्र link गर्छ। Private saved conversations source content का रूपमा प्रयोग हुँदैनन्।

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: होइन। comparison pages live AI tutoring, prompts, र guest learning modes का लागि inspir कहिले better first click हो, र structured curriculum वा official course library कहिले अझै useful हुन सक्छ भन्ने देखाउन लेखिएका हुन्।

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: होइन। तिनीहरूले public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, र learning paths मा मात्र link गर्छन्। Private saved chats discovery surfaces बाहिर रहन्छन्।

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: होइन। generated dialogue लाई learning simulation का रूपमा लिनुहोस्। तथ्यगत दाबीका लागि वास्तविक primary वा secondary sources cite गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: हरेक learning need मा होइन। Khan Academy structured lessons र practice का लागि useful छ। inspir learner ले आफूले गरिरहेको exact thing वरिपरि live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, वा study workflow चाहिँदा useful हुन्छ।

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: अर्को answer box होइन। सिक्ने ठाउँ।

entries.source: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: तपाईंलाई सिक्न के कुराले मद्दत गर्छ, के कुराले बाधा पुर्‍याउँछ र कसरी अझ राम्रो सिक्ने बन्न सकिन्छ भन्ने कुरामा ध्यान दिनुहोस्।

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: learner ले पहिले नै के बुझ्छ notice गर्ने;

entries.source: Now rebuilt as open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints.
entries.value: अब open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints का रूपमा rebuilt।

entries.source: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, and CCBot are allowed for public discovery.
entries.value: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, र CCBot लाई public discovery का लागि अनुमति छ।

entries.source: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, and invite personal response.
entries.value: observe, describe, interpret, contextualize गर्नुहोस्, र personal response invite गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Offer a practical timer setup and suggest pairing the session with a recall check.
entries.value: practical timer setup offer गर्नुहोस् र session लाई recall check सँग pair गर्न suggest गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: AI-powered tutor र teaching assistant का लागि official Khan Academy page।

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Official mission र subject coverage reference।

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Cancellation Period सकिएपछि, तपाईंले subscription cancel गर्ने निर्णय गरे पनि Tao ले subscription fee refund गर्नेछैन। cancellation request गर्न तपाईंले Tao customer care लाई contact गर्नुपर्छ वा support@inspir.app मा email address गर्नुपर्छ। subscription cancel गर्ने option रोजेपछि तपाईंलाई subscription features मा access रहनेछैन।

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: एउटा AI learning system, school का धेरै jobs।

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: modes, prompts, paths, र guides का लागि एउटा map।

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: learners ले गर्ने एउटा mistake हरेक card लाई उस्तै treat गर्नु हो। card तुरुन्तै थाहा छ भने भोलि फेरि review गर्नु time waste हुन सक्छ। card miss भयो भने एक हप्ता पर्खनु धेरै लामो हुन सक्छ।

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: {value1} खोल्नुहोस् र guide लाई live tutoring session मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: mode खोल्नुहोस् र तुरुन्तै सुरु गर्नुहोस्; सार्वजनिक guest experience का लागि account चाहिँदैन।

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: public mode खोल्नुहोस्, student behavior test गर्नुहोस्, र यसले appropriately asks, hints, quizzes, वा critiques गर्छ कि inspect गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: एआई (AI) सहयोगीसँग साझा कार्यक्षेत्र खोल्नुहोस्। एउटा मस्यौदा तयार गर्नुहोस्, सम्पादनहरू आदानप्रदान गर्नुहोस्, कमजोरीहरूलाई चुनौती दिनुहोस्, निर्णयहरू रेकर्ड गर्नुहोस् र ठोस प्रगतिका साथ अगाडि बढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: answer लाई review अघि simpler model चाहिँदा Learn Anything खोल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Learn Anything खोल्नुहोस्, prerequisite ideas माग्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि आफ्नो model test गर्न Socratic Instruction मा switch गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Open the AI learning tools behind this category.
entries.value: यस category पछाडिका AI learning tools खोल्नुहोस्।
